title: Glossary :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
### High quality education provider
A university or other education provider that:
- has been assessed by the New Zealand Qualifications Authority (NZQA) as a 'category 1' Education Organisation
- is a signatory to Ministry of Education's 'Code of Pastoral Care for International Students'.
Information about the category of education organisations is available on NZQA's website.
Find Education Organisations — NZQA
Code of Pastoral Care for International Students — NZQA
Remuneration at or above NZD $59.32 an hour (or the equivalent annual salary) which is:
- able to be sustained by your employer.

### Horticulture industry
Fruit and vegetable growing businesses.
